Item Class: Sceptres
Rarity: Magic
Beryl Rattling Sceptre of the Taskmaster
--------
Spirit: 100
--------
Requires: Level 3, 9 Int
--------
Item Level: 3
--------
Grants Skill: Level 2 Skeletal Warrior Minion
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Beryl" (Tier: 11) - Mana }
+12(10-14) to maximum Mana
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Taskmaster" (Tier: 4) - Minion, Gem }
+1 to Level of all Minion Skills
